name: invoicexml
description: Official InvoiceXML plugin: compliant European e-invoicing (Factur-X, ZUGFeRD, XRechnung, UBL, CII, Peppol) for AI agents.

plugins.name: invoicexml
plugins.description: Create, validate, convert, render, and extract compliant e-invoices (Factur-X, ZUGFeRD, XRechnung, UBL, CII, Peppol BIS Billing 3.0) via the hosted InvoiceXML MCP server. Signs in with OAuth; no API key required.
